nasb.text: They have made all your planks of fir trees from Senir; They have taken a cedar from Lebanon to make a mast for you.

esv.text: They made all your planks of fir trees from Senir; they took a cedar from Lebanon to make a mast for you.

cnv.text: 他們用示尼珥的松樹做你所有的木板； 用黎巴嫩的香柏樹做你的桅杆；

ccb.text: 他们用示尼珥的松木做你的船板， 用黎巴嫩的香柏木做桅杆，
